title: Security Analyst
description: Join our team as a Security Analyst responsible for monitoring, analyzing, and responding to security incidents. You will work with cutting-edge tools and methodologies to protect our clients' critical infrastructure.
requirements: Strong knowledge of SIEM tools and incident response
Experience with threat hunting and analysis

title: Penetration Tester
description: We are looking for a skilled Penetration Tester to identify vulnerabilities in our clients' systems and applications. You will conduct authorized security assessments and provide detailed remediation guidance.
requirements: Proficiency in manual and automated testing techniques
Experience with web, network, and mobile application testing

title: Cryptographic Researcher
description: Seeking a Cryptographic Researcher to advance our understanding of modern cryptographic systems. You will analyze existing implementations, identify weaknesses, and develop novel approaches to secure communications.
requirements: PhD or equivalent experience in cryptography or mathematics
Ability to work on classified projects
